item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses the requested new gift-processing outlet in the lead sentence, names the prior repeated queue/window splits, diagnoses the repeated local-patch pattern, moves upstream to intake triage, ownership, and fulfillment responsibility, and proposes consolidation instead of another channel."}
